levelledPara.title: General
levelledPara.para: This data module gives the system description for the hybrid-electric architecture overview applicable to the AMPEL360E Wide Tube-and-Wing Family baseline. The module identifies the architecture boundary, principal functions, major interfaces, and controlled traceability context for ATLAS 070-000 / 00A.

levelledPara.title: Architecture Boundary
levelledPara.para: The hybrid-electric architecture overview covers the top-level arrangement of the propulsion energy conversion, electrical power distribution, thermal management, control, monitoring, and degraded-mode coordination functions associated with the AMPEL360E eWTW propulsion architecture.

This module does not define detailed maintenance procedures, fault isolation logic, removal and installation steps, or functional test procedures. Those subjects are controlled by the applicable procedural, fault, and test data modules in the same S1000D-CSDB branch.

levelledPara.title: Principal Functions
levelledPara.para: The architecture provides controlled conversion and distribution of propulsion energy, coordination of hybrid-electric operating modes, supervision of electrical and thermal limits, and interface control between propulsion equipment, aircraft-level power systems, monitoring systems, and maintenance support systems.

levelledPara.title: Major System Interfaces
levelledPara.para: The architecture interfaces with the aircraft electrical power system, propulsion control system, energy storage or energy conversion equipment, thermal management system, cockpit indication and recording functions, central maintenance functions, and applicable ground support and diagnostic interfaces.

levelledPara.title: Operating Modes
levelledPara.para: The architecture supports normal, monitored, limited, and degraded operating modes. Mode transition logic, protection thresholds, crew indication, dispatch implications, and maintenance reporting shall be defined in the applicable control, monitoring, fault isolation, and operational data modules.

levelledPara.title: Traceability Context
levelledPara.para: This data module is part of the ATLAS 070-079 Propulsion Eco-Tech and Hybrid-Electric branch. It is intended to support deterministic traceability between architecture definition, S1000D publication artefacts, system interfaces, verification evidence, and lifecycle governance records.

levelledPara.title: Authoring Status
levelledPara.para: This issue is an unverified scaffold. The content shall be reviewed, completed, and validated against the applicable BREX, business rules, applicability model, terminology rules, and programme configuration baseline before publication or CSDB release.
